meta_title: For Students: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Debugging with AI to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn how to leverage AI debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to finish your student portfolio apps with professional-grade speed.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is 'scope creep combined with debugging paralysis.' By integrating AI-assisted debugging into your workflow, you transform runtime errors from blockers into learning milestones. Use Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for surgical CLI-based refactoring to maintain momentum and ship your MVP consistently.
content.intro:
The graveyard of abandoned GitHub repositories is paved with good intentions. You start with a vision of a polished SaaS application, but as complexity compounds, a single, persistent bug transforms your excitement into an insurmountable wall. This isn't a failure of your ability; it is a failure of your feedback loop.

True engineering mastery isn't just about writing code; it's about mastering the art of the 'unblock.' By deploying advanced AI agents, you shift from struggling in isolation to collaborating with a tireless, high-level debugger that respects your architectural intent while crushing the bugs that keep you from the finish line.

steps.title: Architectural Audit
steps.description: Before fixing bugs, identify why the code structure is fighting you. Use Antigravity to map your dependency graph and identify bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure. Identify circular dependencies or overly complex modules that are likely causing the current runtime instability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'Analyze current codebase architecture and identify potential failure points in the main loop.'

steps.title: Surgical Error Isolation
steps.description: Stop guessing. Use Claude Code to pull relevant error logs and trace the execution path to the exact point of failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a diagnostic harness that logs state transitions before the crash. Focus on memory allocation in the API handler.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'Read the last 50 lines of logs, identify the exception, and create a reproduction test case.'

steps.title: Iterative Patching
steps.description: Apply fixes in small, verifiable increments to prevent regression in your fragile student codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a refactor for the identified bug that adheres to SOLID principles while minimizing changes to the existing interface.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'Apply the fix for the identified exception, ensuring all existing unit tests pass.'

steps.title: Regression Defense
steps.description: Automate the verification process to ensure that fixing one bug doesn't spawn three new ones.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of integration tests that specifically target the logic flows where the previous bugs were located.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'Generate a test file that covers edge cases for the recently patched module.'

steps.title: Final Deployment Readiness
steps.description: Clean up the technical debt accumulated during the debugging phase to ensure production stability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the final changes. Suggest optimizations for performance and remove redundant debug logging statements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'Clean up the codebase, remove unused imports, and verify final build stability.'

pro_tips: Treat the AI as a junior partner: always review its generated code for 'hallucinated' imports before running it.
Use Claude Code to generate documentation for your fixes in real-time to keep your README accurate.
Keep your context window clean by deleting obsolete debug logs before starting a new AI session.
Focus on 'failing fast': use AI to write unit tests before you even start the core feature development.
When stuck, ask the AI to 'explain the mental model' of the code block rather than just asking for a fix.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, deploy your project to a public URL and update your portfolio. Use the lessons learned here to start a new project with a focus on modularity.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact workflow to turn broken code into a live product. Stop letting bugs dictate your potential. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
